packet_goal: Give the external writer the compact evidence needed to write reduction methodology: evidence classes split roles runtime-legal variables reduction equations source/property gates and diagnostic-vs-admitted logic.
deliverable: One packet README plus equations/definitions CSV and source-path ledger; no LaTeX edit unless papers board row is separately promoted.
claim_boundary: Do not claim any coefficient admission; do not use CFD mdot wallHeatFlux validation temperatures holdout or external-test data as runtime inputs.

packet_goal: Give the external writer thesis framing with precise contribution boundaries and proof obligations.
deliverable: One packet README with research questions contributions non-claims and compact evidence/source list.
claim_boundary: CFD is high-fidelity reference not experimental validation; contribution is workflow and evidence map not SAM validation.

packet_goal: Summarize case provenance Salt-family split roles retained windows QoI ledgers and legal-use limits without copying raw CFD outputs.
deliverable: Compact source-path and case-role ledger suitable for a LaTeX appendix or evidence directory.
claim_boundary: Do not promote 3D diagnostics to admitted 1D closures; preserve validation/external-test roles.

packet_goal: Bundle exact negative results diagnostic results blocked scorecard state and figure/table captions for prose writing.
deliverable: Evidence packet with exact numbers status tables and caption-ready figure list; no final predictive score values.
claim_boundary: Negative and blocked results are results; do not invent final model performance or candidate admission.

packet_goal: Give external writer a compact conclusion packet with supported conclusions limitations future studies and SAM/CSEM relevance.
deliverable: Conclusion evidence packet with supported-vs-blocked claims and future-work table.
claim_boundary: No SAM validation claim; no experimental validation claim; no future candidate presented as current result.
